bead.title: Update helix specs with ddx-06cbaa90 citations
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The resolver/mode model appears in multiple spec docs, but the cross-reference to ddx-06cbaa90 is not consistently explicit everywhere the project-state path model is described.

ROOT CAUSE
TD-031-bead-state-machine.md:90-125, 186-217, and 384; SD-019-multi-project-server-topology.md:65-78; SD-020-multi-machine-coordinator-topology.md:88-98 and 236; ADR-021-operator-prompt-beads-web-write-path.md:147-153 and 304; workers-sessions-operator-surface.md:41-49 and 67; and plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture.md:19-26 and 230 all describe ddxroot.Path() or project identity, but the spec trail still needs explicit ddx-06cbaa90 breadcrumbs in the updated prose.

PROPOSED FIX
Update each listed helix doc so the path/resolver wording explicitly cites ddx-06cbaa90 wherever it discusses project-scoped state, anchors, or identity.

NON-SCOPE
Install topology docs and Go code.
bead.acceptance:
1. Each listed spec file contains a ddx-06cbaa90 citation in the updated resolver/mode prose.
2. rg "ddx-06cbaa90" docs/helix/ returns hits for each listed spec file.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... ./internal/config/... ./internal/registry/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
